metadata.description: Tamir Cohen's unified Claude Code plugin marketplace — a single catalog pointing to all of his plugin repositories.

plugins.name: tamirs-superpowers
plugins.description: 17 bundled skills, smart worktree hooks, statusline, and MCP server stubs — plan, implement, review, debug, and audit code from one plugin.

plugins.name: jose-claudinho
plugins.description: AI manager for Sport5 Fantasy World Cup 2026: market/team/league tools, weekly snapshots, and rules-aware transfer/captain/lineup recommendations.

plugins.name: headhunter
plugins.description: Job search CRM: pipeline, interviews, tasks, contacts, and Gmail/Calendar/Notion/Todoist integrations with an interview-prep research pipeline.

plugins.name: production-master
plugins.description: Autonomous production investigation plugin for Claude Code — 19 agents, 39 MCP skills, 10-step pipeline. Customize for your infrastructure.
